alerts.headline: Red Flag Warning issued July 23 at 10:10AM PDT until July 25 at 9:00PM PDT by NWS Reno NV
alerts.description:
...FIRE WEATHER WATCH IN EFFECT FROM SUNDAY AFTERNOON THROUGH
SUNDAY EVENING FOR GUSTY WINDS AND LOW HUMIDITY FOR THE SIERRA
FRONT...

The National Weather Service in Reno has issued a Red Flag
Warning for gusty winds and low humidity, which is in effect from
1 PM Friday to 9 PM PDT Saturday. A Fire Weather Watch has also
been issued. This Fire Weather Watch for gusty winds and low
humidity is in effect from Sunday afternoon through Sunday
evening.

* Affected Area...Fire Weather Zone 420 Northe
alerts.instruction:
Avoid outdoor activities that can cause a spark near dry
vegetation, such as yard work, target shooting, or campfires.
Follow local fire restrictions. Check weather.gov/reno for
updates and livingwithfire.info for preparedness tips.

alerts.headline: Extreme Heat Warning issued July 23 at 2:47AM PDT until July 27 at 8:00PM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Dangerously hot conditions expected. Afternoon temperatures
in the desert valleys will climb into the 108 to 114 degree range,
and may exceed 115 along the Colorado River Valley and 120 in Death
Valley. Overnight lows generally 80 to 95 degrees.

* WHERE...Portions of northwest Arizona, southeast California, and
southern Nevada including the Greater Mojave Desert region.

* WHEN...From 10 AM PDT /10 AM MST/ this morning to 8 PM PDT /8 PM
MST/ Monday.

* IMPACTS...Heat related illnesses
alerts.instruction:
Drink plenty of fluids, stay in an air-conditioned room, stay out of
the sun, and check up on relatives and neighbors.

Do not leave young children and pets in unattended vehicles. Car
interiors will reach lethal temperatures in a matter of minutes.

Take extra precautions when outside. Wear lightwe
